name: Improper Input Validation
description: Product does not validate or incorrectly validates input

name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation

name: SQL Injection
description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in SQL commands

name: Exposure of Sensitive Information
description: Intentional or unintentional disclosure of information

name: Improper Authorization
description: Software does not perform authorization checks

name: Use of Broken Crypto Algorithm
description: Use of a risky cryptographic algorithm

name: Cross-Site Request Forgery
description: Web application does not verify request was intentionally provided

name: Insufficiently Protected Credentials
description: Transmitting or storing credentials in an unsafe manner

name: Incorrect Permission Assignment
description: Permissions assigned to resource are incorrect

name: Server-Side Request Forgery
description: Web application fetches a remote resource without validating the URL
